end end return(function(k,o,H,r,X,u,A,N,w,c,v,U,I,a,J,t,h,G,V,x,T)t,c,a,h,V,w,N,G,x,U,v,J,I,T=function()w=w+(809327+-809326)J[w]=879960-879959 return w end,function(c,H,r,X)local
